name: Test Discover
description: Scan a project for test files and extract test suite/case structure. Auto-detects framework from config files (vitest.config, jest.config, pytest.ini, etc.).

parameters.name: rootDir
parameters.description: Root directory to scan for tests (defaults to project root)

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Glob pattern to match test files (e.g. '**/*.test.ts'). Auto-detected from framework config if omitted.

outputDescription: Object with {framework, configFile, testFiles: [{path, suites: [{name, tests: [string]}]}], totalFiles, totalTests}.
author: openspace
